userId.description: The ID of the user who recorded the session.

timestamp.description: The start time of the session (Unix timestamp).

duration.description: The duration of the session in milliseconds.

severity.description: The calculated severity level (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe).

rms.description: The Root Mean Square value of the tremor.

frequency.description: The dominant frequency of the tremor in Hz.

data.description: JSON stringified array of SensorData points.

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Stores recorded tremor assessment sessions for users.
